'''Yityl''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yityl system/Legends|Yityl system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] such as [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] Agent [[Hewat]] and her daughter [[Kora]].
